name: Aaron Scott
abstract: Aaron Scott (born 1956) is an American composer and jazz drummer from Chicago, Illinois. He has studied at several prestigious music schools.

about_quotes.speaker: Tyner McCoy
about_quotes.evidence: Avery and Aaron Scott seemed to be your rhythm section for a while... Aaron replaced him [Louis Hayes].
